title: Cloudy (old clouds)
description: Reverts the new clouds back to 1.21.5
body: # Cloudy *Old is gold!* [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cloudy) [![Organization](https://img.shields.io/badge/Organization-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=black)](https://modrinth.com/organization/cre8to-team) [![Feedback](https://img.shields.io/badge/feedback%20form%20(no%20login)-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=googleforms&color=indigo)](https://forms.gle/fkgMp6YroGjwH8Nr5) [![Donate@CupOfCoffee](https://img.shields.io/badge/donate%20a%20cup%20of%20coffee-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=patreon&color=black)](https://patreon.com/cre8to) ![AboutThePack](https://img.shields.io/badge/-About%20this%20pack-darkblue?style=for-the-badge) Adds back the old clouds from 1.21.5 before they were updated in snapshot 25w21a Compatibility Works on snapshot 25w21a and higher, no effect on older versions [![Banner](https://github.com/Creatomat/creatomat.github.io/blob/main/cre8to_1.png?raw=true)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2788)
